stories.title: Sights, sounds and more second-round moments
stories.summary: Here is the best of the action from Friday at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: NFL pushes back on criticism of streaming games
stories.summary: The NFL is defending its expanded lineup of games on streaming platforms amid criticism from President Donald Trump and scrutiny from the U.S. Justice Department.

stories.title: Underwood gets new deal after Final Four run
stories.summary: Illinois and coach Brad Underwood have agreed to new financial terms on his current six-year contract that runs through 2031-32, and the deal could extend through 2035-36 based on the team's performance over the next four seasons.

stories.title: NFL sees Wednesday play as 'only good' for fans
stories.summary: Increased ratings and the league's focus on holiday seasons could lead to more games on nontraditional days, NFL officials say.

stories.title: Back soon? Skubal tossing 2 weeks post-surgery
stories.summary: Tigers left-hander Tarik Skubal is playing catch, just two weeks after having surgery on his pitching elbow, sparking hope in Detroit that the team's ace could be back sooner than expected.
